title: ResetData
description:
`update --reset <skill>` — discard a local draft back to the followed `current` (or an imported
skill's last-fetched origin snapshot). The describe LEADS with what is lost. **INFERRED.**

applied.description: `true` on the `--yes` apply, `false` on the describe.

drop_diff.description: The unified diff of the draft that would be (describe) / was (apply) discarded.

to_version.description: The version the reset lands on (the followed current / the origin snapshot).
